metadata.description: Cowork — a protocol for Opus + Codex collaboration via three explicit slash commands.

plugins.name: cowork
plugins.description: Three slash commands: /cowork (full five-stage protocol: parallel research, dual plans with mutual critique, implementation, Codex adversarial review loop until sign-off), /cowork:question (10-agent research with Opus synthesis), /cowork:rescue (forward a stuck turn to Codex with full context and no sandbox). All Codex dispatches use gpt-5.4 at xhigh effort through a forked unrestricted Codex runtime.
